title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.480 - Execution and revival sued out where judgment was rendered — except magistrate judgments
text:
511.480.  Execution and revival sued out where judgment was rendered — except magistrate judgments. — 1.  Sections 511.460 to 511.480 shall be deemed to authorize the court where such transcript shall be filed to issue executions on such judgment or decree and to exercise all powers incident to the judgment including judgment debtor proceedings, and a scire facias to revive such judgment or decree or lien.
  2.  Transcripts of judgments described in section 511.440 shall not authorize the courts where such transcripts shall be filed to issue executions thereon or to issue a scire facias to revive such judgments, but they shall issue and be sued out of the court where the original judgment or decree was rendered.
(RSMo 1939 § 1310, A.L. 1965 p. 659) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1146; 1919 § 1597; 1909 § 2166
